incorrects.description: Student filled one or more slots incorrectly on first attempt

steps.text: Look at the labels on your rectangle. Which number shows the total area?

incorrects.description: Student filled one or more slots incorrectly on second attempt

params.description: Area label at rectangle center highlights.

steps.text: The area goes in the first blank. The fixed side length, 4, goes in the second blank. Then fill the multiplication to show width times height equals that area.

incorrects.description: Student filled one or more slots incorrectly three or more times. System models the correct answer.

params.description: System fills all five slots in order: area value in slot 1, 4 in slot 2, width in slot 3, height in slot 4, area in slot 5.

steps.text: Here's how this sentence works. The area is a multiple of 4 because 4 times the number of rows equals the area. The first blank names the area. The second blank names what it's a multiple of. The last three blanks show the multiplication that proves it.
